gist.headline: The hive goes anime
gist.blurb: AnimePollen has officially joined the creative showcase. Turn your text prompts into instant anime illustrations, no drawing skills required.
gist.summary: Added AnimePollen, a free AI anime art generator, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use AnimePollen directly from the creative directory to generate anime-style illustrations.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an anime art generator. Visuals: The Pollinations bee (Polly) interacting with anime tropes (cherry blossoms, magical girl bow) while generating art on a retro monitor.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny magical girl bow, looking at a retro computer monitor displaying a pixelated anime landscape. The monitor glows with soft lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel pink and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
